name: @appstrate/leboncoin-browser
description: First-party deterministic Browser Use MCP driver for the @appstrate/leboncoin integration. It attaches to Appstrate's isolated CDP worker for session acquisition and read-only listing tools, and surfaces DataDome or account-verification challenges without exposing credentials.
author: Appstrate

tools.name: acquire_session
tools.description: Private Appstrate connect hook. Signs in or restores bounded Leboncoin browser state and returns an authenticated proof. Never exposed to the agent.

tools.name: search_listings
tools.description: Search Leboncoin in the authenticated isolated browser and return a bounded list of listing summaries. Read-only.

tools.name: get_listing
tools.description: Open one canonical leboncoin.fr/ad URL in the authenticated isolated browser and return its visible details. Read-only.

tools.name: session_status
tools.description: Report whether the isolated browser currently holds a Leboncoin login cookie. Cookie values are never returned.
